raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Declarative affirmation establishing energetic and relational boundaries",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "Clarity, non-shrinkage, non-merging, and truth-honoring are attainable and preferable states",
    "A 'space' possesses the capacity to honor or dishonor an objective or transcendent truth",
    "The speaker holds sovereign discernment over when such honoring has ceased"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally coherent; parallel structure reinforces a unified stance of non-reactive authenticity",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "When recited or enacted as a living practice that actually increases presence, clarity, and compassionate discernment rather than defensiveness",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "When the phrase functions as spiritual bypass, premature exit, or subtle superiority that avoids genuine encounter under the guise of 'honoring truth'"
}
